vllm.title: [FEAT] [ROCm] Add AITER int8 scaled gemm kernel
vllm.author: tjtanaa
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Description
This is a PR to integrate int8 scaled gemm kernel and focus on the model generated in compressed tensor format using llm-compressor.
To use this feature, set VLLM_ROCM_USE_AITER=1. (Default value of VLLM_ROCM_USE_AITER_LINEAR is 1 [enabled by default when AITER is used])
Performance Gain

vllm.title: [V1] [Feature] Collective RPC
vllm.author: wwl2755
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
FIX: #15430 and #15349.


Support LLM to directly use collective_rpc() mentioned in #15430 and #15349.


Use cloudpickle to make sure the local functions can still be serialized

vllm.title: [Feature][Disaggregated] Support XpYd disaggregated prefill with MooncakeStore
vllm.author: ShangmingCai
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This is the initial PR to implement XpYd as described in the design doc, which has gone through several rounds of discussions in the #feat-prefill-disaggregation slack channel and reached a preliminary consensus.
This PR mainly includes the changes related to KVTransferParams. In the implementation

vllm.title: [V1] Support interleaved modality items
vllm.author: ywang96
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Partially unblock #15130 - the current workaround can be inefficient in case there are a large number of interleaved items in the current batch (e.g, <image><video><image><video><image>), but this should be a rare case as typically these embeddings are individually fairly big.
Note use_audio_in_vide

cc @comaniac
